content.en:
Protoss.

In the depths of a glorious temple, an illusory soul body suddenly appeared on top of a cyan lotus, and this soul body was the first god master of the god clan.

I saw that the First Divine Lord opened his eyes, and the depths of his eyes were full of fear: "What a terrifying Lord of the Yuan Gu, he killed me in just one move, if it weren't for the Soul Baolian who could store my soul and reshape the soul back in the moment on my body, otherwise I would really die!"

Wow!

The First Divine Lord walked out of the Soul Lotus, and his physical body recovered little by little.

In the blink of an eye, the First Divine Lord had a complete physical body.

But now, he is very weak and it will take him a long time to recover.

"The order is down, and the Protoss is on alert, ready to fight at any time. In addition, inform the other supremes of the Protoss that they will all gather here!"

The First Divine Lord ordered.

At the same time, the first demon lord of the demon clan also appeared in the depths of the demon base camp in the form of a soul body, and after recovering his physical body, a meeting was also held, and the demon clan also entered a state of war alert.

It can be said that this incident completely stunned all races.

The death of hundreds of supreme beings is just a trivial matter, and what is really serious is that all races will have no right to rule at all.

......

Terran, Holy City.

Ye Tian quickly accepted the matter about the fall of hundreds of supremes, because this matter had too much impact, and the information network of the Heavenly Pavilion also knew about it.

In addition, Ye Tian also knew the news that the Kunwu Supreme, one of the supremes of the human race, was seriously injured.

The only fortunate thing is that the Terrans did not have the fall of the Supreme.

For the first time, Ye Tian went to Kunwu Hall to visit Ye Tian, but Kunwu Supreme did not see Ye Tian for the first time, so Kunwu Supreme was healing.

Three years later, an incarnation of the Kunwu Supreme met Ye Tian.

"Kungo Supreme, how are you?"

Ye Tian asked.

Kunwu Supreme sighed: "I can't die, but this time the injury is estimated to not be healed for thousands of years!"

"Kungo Supreme, what the hell is going on?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Kunwu Supreme showed fear and said: "In fact, what happened, I don't know, the supreme of the god race and the demon race found that the supreme of the twelve universe epochs gathered in the ancient hall, and all gathered together, as if they were doing something big, so they notified the supreme of all races to go, but the outer divine array stopped us." Soon after, an aura similar to the Chaos Arcana was transmitted, shaking the universe. After that, the Lord of the Yuan Gu waited for the Supreme to come out, and the Lord of the Yuan Gu alone killed hundreds of Supreme Beings in an instant, among which the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord were also killed in an instant. However, I heard that the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord appeared in the two gods and demons, and it seems that they survived with special secret techniques, but the other hundreds of Supremes have really fallen, and the seriously injured Supremes are even more than hundreds. I'm lucky, I'm a little farther away, otherwise I wouldn't have survived!"

"What, how can this be?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Kunwu Supreme said: "I guess that those supremes of the Twelve Universe Era should have been freed from the suppression of the universe and could exert great strength. The Lord of the Ancient was once the Supreme of the Sons of the Top Era, much more powerful than us Supremes. "

"In this way, aren't the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era the Supremes who can easily sweep away the Supremes of all races, and aren't all the races dangerous?" Ye Tian asked.

"Probably not!" Kunwu Supreme said: "At that time, after the Lord of the Yuan Gu killed hundreds of Supremes in seconds, he didn't make any more moves, and the Supremes of the other twelve universe epochs didn't make any more moves. Obviously, they won't kill us all, otherwise most of our Supremes won't be able to come back. In addition, they should not attack the Wan Clan, the agreement signed at the beginning has not ended, and they should not make a move in the next 90,000 years. But after 90,000 years, it won't be for sure!"

"Ninety thousand years?"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Ye Tian, grow up as soon as possible, the situation in the universe is changeable now, what are the plans of the supremes of the twelve universe eras, we still don't know, as long as you grow up as soon as possible, you can hope to fight against those supremes!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"Kungo Supreme, I will work hard!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Ye Tian, I'm going back to stabilize my injuries, I won't be out of the customs for the next thousands of years, if there is anything, you can go to other supremes for help, in this period, other supremes will do their best to help you!"

After Kunwu Supreme finished speaking, he revoked this incarnation.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

After returning to the Holy City Heavenly Pavilion, Ye Tian began to ponder.

His current growth rate is already very fast, but it is a little difficult to become a supreme within 90,000 years.

It's not a matter of cultivating talent, nor is it a matter of resources, it's a matter of accumulation.

He needed to accumulate to the limit in each realm, otherwise it would affect his impact on the transcendent realm, but in this way, it would be difficult for his cultivation to be fast.

If he didn't pay attention to accumulation and potential, he would definitely be able to impact the Supreme Realm in a short period of time, but that would be the weakest Supreme.

Moreover, he would even die under the thunderstorm.

"Hole cards, I need hole cards, and I need to grow faster!"

Ye Tian was entangled and thinking at the same time, and soon thought of a solution.

"Genius!"

This talent comes from the talent of the Mixed Yuan Tianzun, and it is also the secret of the Mixed Yuan Tianzun that can become one of the most special Tianzun and the strongest life-saving Tianzun.

Many supreme beings in the universe knew that the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Venerable had many clones, and these clones could be recreated if they died, and no one even knew which one the Mixed Yuan Heavenly Venerable was in itself.

But Ye Tian used the copying talent to check the talent of the Mixed Yuan Tianzun, and copied and fused it to his own body, but he had never used this talent.

The deity talent is different from the ordinary doppelganger talent, the general doppelganger talent is to separate a doppelganger that is similar to his own cultivation, and he can't maintain it for a long time, while the deity talent is to create a second deity and a third deity, each deity can be cultivated uniquely, this is what Ye Tian understands from the deity talent.

It is not easy to create a second Buddha-figure, and it requires Arcana as an embryo.

In addition, all Buddha-figures share the same consciousness, which means that it is not realistic for several Buddha-figures to fight together, and if you fight with all your heart, you can only use one Buddha-figure, and the other Buddha-figures are just an empty shell.

Because in a real battle, it is too difficult to distract yourself from controlling several deities' bodies, and each of them uses different secret skills and talents, and it will even affect your combat effectiveness.

To put it simply, the deity talent is equivalent to creating a few spare puppets, but unlike ordinary puppets, it can be integrated into the consciousness of the body, and it can be cultivated, fighting, and so on.

It is precisely because of this that the battles of the Mixed Yuan Supreme are often the appearance of one deity, and there has never been a picture of multiple deities besieging the enemy together, which is also a flaw in the deity's talent.

And now, Ye Tian is ready to create a second deity, and then let the second deity quickly ascend to the supreme realm.

Of course, an ordinary supreme is of little use, but he can enter the wasteland and use the desolate master's order to control the wasteland.

A desolate realm is not a weak force, enough to be used as Ye Tian's hole card, and he can also use the desolate realm origin power of the desolate realm to cultivate and quickly improve his strength.

It's a double win!
